spine_sources_used: Google search by metro + 'commercial cleaning company'
Expertise.com top-N city lists (lead source, every entry verified via direct site fetch)
Inven.ai / Cerco.ai top-N TX lists (lead source, verified)
BBB profiles (cross-reference for owner names / founding year)
spine_sources_attempted_blocked: BSCAI member directory at www.bscai.org/Public/Find-Members.aspx - 404 / requires member login (paywall)
ISSA member directory at issa.com - not publicly searchable for TX subset
Texas Comptroller HUB database - not directly queryable per business via public web (queryable only by HUB ID via state portal)
exclusion_filters_applied: Franchise brands: JaniKing, Coverall, Office Pride, Stratus Building Solutions, JAN-PRO, Vanguard Cleaning Systems, Anago Cleaning Systems, System4, Corvus Janitorial Systems, ServiceMaster Clean (and ServiceMaster master franchises like 'ServiceMaster Janitorial by TAG', 'ServiceMaster Commercial Cleaning by Legacy', 'ServiceMaster Building Services by Dogwood', 'ServiceMaster Commercial Cleaning by the Experts'), SERVPRO franchise locations, Merry Maids franchise locations

Large national B2B accounts (>200 employees or NYSE-listed): ABM Industries, GCA Services (now ABM), Pritchard Industries, Aramark, C&W Services, Diversified Maintenance, Marsden Holdings, Harvard Maintenance, OpenWorks

Out-of-state HQ with TX branch only (Clean Team Inc Albuquerque NM, CBM Corp Syosset NY, Maintenance Resources Inc Denver CO, RenKe Building Maintenance Shreveport LA, DBS Building Solutions multi-state, Clean Method multi-state)

Texas-based but headcount too large for SMB target (McLemore Building Maintenance ~1,000+ employees, DTK Facility Services ~1,800+ employees, Redlee/SCS Inc 2,800+ employees) - logged as separate notes, kept Redlee out of spine

Residential-primary maid services (English Maids, Mary's Cleaning Edinburg, Anthony's Super Cleaning, Genesis Carpet Cleaning - flagged as mixed-residential where small-commercial component exists; only commercial-primary or >50% commercial businesses retained)

Self-identified franchise sellers / multi-unit licensors flagged but retained with 'flag_for_enrichment' note (AMC Commercial Cleaning, Corporate Building Services CBS, Strategic Janitorial Solutions, Professional Polish, Like New Building Solutions)
_meta.verification_protocol: Each entry has a live website fetch with timestamp. No company included on snippet-only evidence. Founded year, address, and franchise-independence appear in a direct fetch of the company's own site. Where the live site is unreachable (403, expired cert, 502, 404), the candidate was either dropped OR included with explicit 'low confidence' notes and zero independence_verified=true claim.
data_verification_warnings: Several entries have null founded_year because website states only '20+ years' / 'over 30 years' without an explicit year - flagged for enrichment phase to cross-check via Texas Secretary of State / Comptroller Active Taxpayer registry
Owner names are sparse on most company websites - enrichment phase should pull Comptroller franchise tax record holder, BBB business profile owner, and LinkedIn CEO

Some entries (e.g. AMC Commercial Cleaning, Corporate Building Services) mention 'franchise opportunities available' on their site - this likely means they sell their own franchises, not that they ARE a franchise. Flagged for enrichment-phase deeper check before any A-tier promotion.
